creator: ek@purplehat.org
text: Thanks! This is definitely a known issue and I'm working on an updated port (I wish I had more time...) Being as Maia doesn't *need* WDDX to function, a quick workaround until the port is updated would be to simply remove the WDDX requirement from the Makefile (I've attached a patch as well.) Many people (myself included) have been running Maia with PHP74 for many months without issues.
